subcodes.first_line: Glorified be He Who hath created all things through His command and ordained the measures of every matter in a hidden and glorious Tablet, and therein decreed [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: فسبحان الذی خلق کل شیء بامره و قدر مقادیر کل امر فی لوح عز مکنون و شرع فیه
subcodes.subjects: @proclamation to people of the Bayan, @divine unity [tawhid] and degrees of unity, @laws of God; of the Kitab-i-Aqdas, @nearness and remoteness
